name: Mohammad Rizky Pratama
title: Quality Assurance Engineer
tagline: Building Quality into Every Development Cycle
bio: Experienced Technical Lead focused on translating business needs into technical plans, leading sprint planning, and managing cross-functional team execution. I have a strong background in Software Quality Assurance, spanning automation, performance, and API testing, helping deliver high-impact products on time while maintaining strong alignment with business goals and user needs.
philosophy: Quality is not an act, it is a habit. I believe in shifting-left testing, continuous improvement, and collaborative development. Every bug found in development saves ten in production.
